next_steps: Perform immunohistochemical staining on biopsy tissue for CD20, CD3, and EBER-ISH to confirm or rule out CNS lymphoma
Send cerebrospinal fluid for JC virus PCR to evaluate for PML in the setting of chronic mycophenolate mofetil therapy
Perform silver and acid-fast staining on biopsy tissue to exclude occult fungal or Nocardia infection
Perform flow cytometry on biopsy tissue to characterize the atypical cellular infiltrate
Obtain systemic malignancy staging with whole-body PET/CT imaging if CNS lymphoma is not confirmed
Carefully balance glucocorticoid administration to manage edema while avoiding masking of underlying malignancy or infection
Review biopsy slides specifically for cytomegalovirus or other opportunistic viral inclusions
